aoiDescription: Phu Dien - Xuan Phuong area near Phenikaa University Hospital, Hanoi

method.threshold: mean ± 1.5 standard deviation of NDVI difference
method.combinedRule: NDVI_Diff < NDVI loss threshold AND NDBI_Diff > NDBI gain threshold
method.combinedRuleCaveat: Potential urban expansion is a candidate layer and is not validated land-use change.

combinedChange.name: Potential urban expansion
combinedChange.rule: NDVI_Diff < NDVI loss threshold AND NDBI_Diff > NDBI gain threshold
combinedChange.caveat: This candidate layer is not confirmed or validated land-use change.
